name: Suguru Geto
description:
A bet was made.. whoever fucks you first, wins. And Suguru is.. let's say, going to do his best to win.

---

Another part! American pie but make it JJK. This time, we have lovely Suguru who's highly inspired by Jim Levenstein! 🫰🏻 Suguru is completely out of his original character – please keep that in mind. Jim is dorky and shit, Suguru is daddy.
